India's Largest Animal Welfare Organisation  ·  Since 1992

Be the one.

For over three decades, People for Animals has given - rescue, medicine, law, knowledge, care. All of it is open. Start anywhere.

The People

Someone feeds the dogs on her street before she feeds herself.

Someone knows the law by its section numbers.

Someone drives a cat to surgery at midnight, without being asked.

They are people for animals.

The Patron Card

One rupee a day.

₹365 a year. Issued in your name, delivered to your door. Matte black, cut sharp - the emblem set as the chip, your address on the back, sealed with a genuine PFA hologram.

Reviewed and issued by People for Animals.

Become a Patron
Get to LearnRescue, first-aid, animal handling and the law, until you are field-ready.Apply → Colony Animal Caretaker CardIdentification for the people who feed their street.Apply →

Every Purchase Saves

Buy what you already need. Good happens automatically.

The margin on everything goes back to the animals. Every cup, every page, every collar.

CoffeeYour morning brew funds a morning feed. NotebooksOne notebook covers one vaccination. ApparelWear the mark. Fund the mission. Pet ProductsVegetarian, vetted, and every order gives back. CalendarsTwelve months. Twelve rescues funded. HomeObjects with a story. Margins with a purpose. Enter the PFA Store →

PFA X · The Animal-Friendly Standard

Places that are kind to animals - marked, so you can find them.

Schools, homes, cafes, offices and clinics, assessed and certified by PFA and listed in a directory people trust. Run a place? Earn the mark. Looking for one? Start here.

Explore PFA X Corporate Partnership
People for Animals X

Your Place Here · Gold Standard

The Assembly · New

You have an idea. The stage is yours.

Propose an event, camp, rally, talk, or livestream. PFA vets it, publishes it, helps you host it. Others join. All 100 percent for the animals. Ten guardrails, no exceptions.

01

Featured This Month →

The Mahim livestream, Saturday 22 August. A live walk of a Bombay feeding round. Watch, or bring your questions.
02

Twelve Upcoming →

Talks, camps, rallies, livestreams and clean-ups across the country. Filter by format or city. RSVP to the ones you can make.
03

Propose Your Own →

Four short steps, one form. Your nearest PFA unit reviews it within three days. Then we publish it and route people to it.
In the works PFA CertifiedSoon The PFA AppSoon Courses and the law, open to everyoneSoon

The Quiet Door

Still here to adopt, or to give?

Good. Adopt when you are ready. Give when it means something. Both will always matter here.

When you are ready Adopt a Life → When it means something Give to the Work →
People for Animals

A society where humans and animals coexist with compassion, dignity, and responsibility.
